creator: risner@stdio.com
text:
Allan Jude noted my error, grepping sysctl -a with zfs_max_missing_tvds failed to find vfs.zfs.max_missing_tvds.

So the option is indeed in FreeBSD 13, just not as described in man zfs-module-parameters precisely.

Can we add a note at the bottom of the man page on FreeBSD with something similar to "on FreeBSD zfs_ is vfs.zfs. in sysctl."?
